creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Patch work fine for me!
Thanks!

Version VBox in the CLI:
admin@vladiom:~ % vboxmanage --version
5.1.20r114628

Version VBox in the GUI (with warning message):
admin@vladiom:~ % VirtualBox
Qt WARNING: libpng warning: iCCP: known incorrect sRGB profile

VirtualBox Graphical User Interface Version 5.1.20 r114628

In the attachment patch for the port.
